zh.lifeSummary: 當John Grey於1319年之前出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾亨利--坦斯時，他的父親John Grey18歲，母親Katharine FitzAlan18歲。他於大約1344年與Mathilda de Burghersh結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年6月4日在英國諾薩普頓史爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Grey于1319年之前出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾亨利--坦斯时，他的父亲John Grey18岁，母亲Katharine FitzAlan18岁。他于大约1344年与Mathilda de Burghersh结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年6月4日在英国諾薩普頓史爾，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Grey was born before 1319, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Grey, was 18 and his mother, Katharine FitzAlan, was 18. He married Mathilda de Burghersh about 1344. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 June 1375, in Northamptonshire, England, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Grey est né avant 1319, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Grey, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Katharine FitzAlan, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mathilda de Burghersh environ 1344. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1375, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Grey vor 1319 in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Grey 18 und seine Mutter Katharine FitzAlan 18. Er hat um 1344 Mathilda de Burghersh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1375 in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Grey è nato il prima del 1319 nel Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Grey, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Katharine FitzAlan, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mathilda de Burghersh circa 1344. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1375, nel Northamptonshire, England, e fu sepolto a Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Greyが1319年以前にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで生まれた時，父John Greyは18歳，母Katharine FitzAlanは18歳であった。約1344年にMathilda de Burghershと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年6月4日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Grey(이)가 1319년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Grey(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharine FitzAlan(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1344년 Mathilda de Burghersh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 6월 4일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.1349: de 9 de janeiro de 1349 a 8 de janeiro de 1350
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Grey nasceu antes 1319, em Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Grey, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Katharine FitzAlan, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilda de Burghersh aproximadamente 1344. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1375, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Grey родился перед 1319 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Grey было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharine FitzAlan, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilda de Burghersh около 1344 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1375 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
